history.content:
<thought>
The goal is visible ahead to the right. The cell directly in front of me is a safe floor tile, so I should move forward to get closer while avoiding the lava further right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I moved forward and now I am directly below a wall if I continue straight upward. The open path toward the goal is to my right, while the cells further right in my current row include lava, so I should first turn right to face the safe corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing right. The cell directly in front of me is a safe floor tile, while the goal is visible further ahead and to the left beyond a lava obstacle. Advancing into the open corridor is the safest step.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
